script_text: Every author writes for a reason.
We call that the author's purpose.
Usually it is to teach, to entertain, or to convince.
Fact books want to teach us.
They share facts, steps, and pictures that help us learn.
Stories entertain us. They make us laugh, cry, or wonder.
Some texts try to convince. They give reasons to agree with the author.
When you finish, ask: why did the author write this?
Now you are ready to spot author purpose!
